reviews.comment:
El domingo pasado (3/7/2022) fui a recargar el matafuegos. No había lugar para estacionar en la confitería pero los sres de vigilancia me dejaron estacionar en un puesto que tenia conos,  fueron muy amables. Por suerte había matafuegos para hacer el cambio con el modelo que había llevado yo. Todo salió 1400$ (decuento socio ACA 150$) estoy muy agradecida. El cambio del matafuegos fue rapidísimo.

(Translated by Google)
Last Sunday (July 3, 2022) I went to get my fire extinguisher refilled. There was no parking available at the café, but the security guards let me park in a spot marked with cones; they were very kind. Luckily, they had fire extinguishers available to exchange for the model I had brought. The total cost was $1400 (ACA member discount of $150), and I'm very grateful. The fire extinguisher exchange was very quick.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPMGVEZ1N3EAE

reviews.comment:
Si no sos socio del aca , te ladran, te dejan esperando,  me pasó 3 veces, pensé que era mi impresión. Comprobado 👎

(Translated by Google)
If you're not a member of the ACA, they bark at you, they leave you waiting. It happened to me three times; I thought it was just my imagination. Confirmed 👎

reviews.comment:
Hoy un día más que no me dejan parar un minuto para usar el baño soy mujer taxista y el personal de seguridad  tiene cero empatia a la hora tratarnos  .
Estaría bueno que consideren que además de consumir  siempre que paramos  .
No se tenga en cuenta nada o es que nos discriminan ???
Quizás sea hora de hacer algo ya que no soy la única que pasa por esta situación.

(Translated by Google)
Today is another day where they won't let me stop for a minute to use the restroom. I'm a female taxi driver, and the security staff has zero empathy when dealing with us. It would be good if they considered that, besides the fact that we always buy things when we stop, nothing else matters. Or are we being discriminated against? Perhaps it's time to do something, since I'm not the only one going through this.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPeEt1cUVnEAE
